CREATE TABLE timestamps (id INT, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO timestamps VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '1992-09-20 20:38:40'), (2, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 12:15:30'), (3, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 03:45:15');
SELECT datepart('minute', event_time) FROM timestamps WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, datepart('hour', event_time) AS event_hour FROM timestamps WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP '1992-09-20 00:00:00' AND event_time < TIMESTAMP '1992-10-01 00:00:00';
SELECT id, event_time, datepart('day', event_time) AS event_day FROM timestamps WHERE datepart('month', event_time) = 10;
SELECT id, event_time, datepart('second', event_time) AS event_second FROM timestamps WHERE datepart('year', event_time) = 2023 ORDER BY event_second DESC;
SELECT t1.id, datepart('minute', t1.event_time) AS event_minute, datepart('hour', t2.event_time) AS join_hour FROM timestamps t1 JOIN timestamps t2 ON t1.id != t2.id;
CREATE TABLE events (event_id INT, event_timestamp TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO events VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '1992-09-20 20:38:40'), (2, TIMESTAMP '1993-05-15 14:25:10');

SELECT e.event_id, datepart('minute', e.event_timestamp) AS event_minute, t.date_part AS part FROM events e JOIN (SELECT datepart('day', event_time) AS date_part FROM timestamps WHERE id = 2) t ON e.event_timestamp < TIMESTAMP '1995-12-31 23:59:59';
SELECT MAX(datepart('hour', event_time)) AS max_hour FROM timestamps WHERE datepart('year', event_time) = 2023;
WITH time_parts AS (SELECT id, datepart('minute', event_time) AS minute_part FROM timestamps) SELECT id, minute_part FROM time_parts WHERE minute_part > 30;
SELECT datepart('week', event_time) AS event_week, COUNT(*) FROM timestamps GROUP BY event_week HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
